    S

    saveUserProfile(Context, String, String, String, Runnable, UserRepository.ErrorCallback) - Static method in class com.example.codebase.UserRepository
    Persists the user's full profile to Firestore and updates the in-memory AppCache on success.

    Utility class that reads unread notifications from Firestore for the current device and posts them as local Android notifications.

    Sets the date and time of the lottery draw.

    Injects the Event and Entrant data required for this fragment to function.

    Sets the Firestore document ID of the related event.
    setEventId(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets the secondary event ID and synchronises Event.id to the same value.
    setEventTitle(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Sets the display title of the related event.
    setGeoEnabled(boolean) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets whether geolocation verification is required for this event.
    setId(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets the primary event ID and synchronises Event.eventId to the same value.
    setLocation(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets the event location.
    setMaxCapacity(Long) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets the maximum enrolment capacity for this event.

    Sets the body text of the notification.
    setName(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.User
    Sets the name for the user.
    setNotificationId(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Sets the unique notification document ID.
    setOrganizerDeviceId(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets the device ID of the event's organizer.
    setPhoneNumber(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.User
    Sets the optional phone number for the user.
    setPoster(EventPoster) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets the event poster.

    Sets the Base64-encoded string representation of the poster image.
    setPosterUrl(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets the URL of the remotely hosted poster image.
    setPrice(float) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets the participation fee for the event.
    setRead(boolean) - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Sets the read state of this notification.

    Sets the registration deadline.
    setRegistrationDeadlineDate(Date) - Method in class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsAdapter
    Sets the event's registration deadline and triggers a full rebind so that all Cancel button states are updated immediately.

    Sets the date from which entrants may join the waiting list.

    Sets the role for the user.

    Sets the event start date and time.

    Sets the lottery outcome status for this notification.

    Sets the raw Firestore status string for this event.

    Sets the subject line of the notification.
    setTitle(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Sets the event title.
    setType(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Sets the recipient group type this notification was sent to.
    setUserId(String) - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Sets the device ID of the entrant this notification was sent to.

    Replaces the waiting-list entrant collection.

    Sets the maximum number of entrants permitted on the waiting list.

    Sets the number of entrants to select during the lottery draw.
